input: Generate a weekly content package for my devtools SaaS. Platforms: LinkedIn, Twitter, Dev.to. Pillars: tutorials (40%), behind-the-scenes (30%), industry (20%), promo (10%).
rubric: Output includes 5 LinkedIn posts with hooks in first line
Output includes 1 Twitter thread with 5+ tweets
Output includes 1 Dev.to article outline with tags

input: Write a Dev.to article about our open source CLI tool
